---
title: "ICP Forests Explorer"
description: "Interactive dashboard for exploring ICP Forests monitoring data across European forest sites."
date: "2025-01-01"
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [App, Shiny, Forest Monitoring]
---

## About

An interactive Shiny app that walks through a full forest-monitoring workflow on the
**ICP Forests Level II** plots in Brandenburg — focused on the Barnim / Schorfheide around
the Thünen Institute of Forest Ecosystems in Eberswalde. Tabs cover an interactive plot map,
data availability, quality control, gap-filling (linear / spline / climatology with
cross-validation), a daily soil-water balance with a drought-stress indicator, a transparent
emulation of the **4C** forest model (NPP, transpiration, soil water under climate scenarios),
and a random-forest model that predicts drought-stress risk.

Built entirely from free, real data — ICP Forests Level II open data, the DWD climate series
for Angermünde, and SoilGrids-derived field capacity per plot. It runs from prepared CSVs out
of the box and uses a PostgreSQL/PostGIS backend when one is available.

## Live Demo

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://anayananayana.shinyapps.io/icp_forests_demo/"
        width="100%" height="650" style="border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:8px;">
</iframe>
```

[Open app in new tab](https://anayananayana.shinyapps.io/icp_forests_demo/){.btn .btn-primary}

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [Shiny]{.badge-skill} [PostGIS]{.badge-skill} [Random Forest]{.badge-skill} [Forest Monitoring]{.badge-skill}
